name: Maison Solutions Inc.
business: Maison Solutions Inc. is a specialty grocery retailer offering traditional Asian food and merchandise to U.S. consumers, primarily Asian-American communities. The company operates seven traditional Asian supermarkets as center stores and plans to develop satellite stores, with the first being the Alhambra Store. It acquired Lee Lee Oriental Supermart in Arizona in April 2024.

exposures.sentence: Customers can choose to place orders on a third-party mobile app Freshdeals24, and an applet integrated into WeChat for either home delivery or in-store pickups offering our customers the option of a 100% cashier-less shopping experience.
Our in-house logistics team is committed to fast and reliable delivery for customers who place online orders for delivery.

By partnering with JD.com, we will be able to use big data analytics and artificial intelligence to explore warehousing automation solutions which we believe will allow us to achieve lean management of storage, improvement of production efficiency and reduction of operating costs through the use of fully automated warehouses that require limited human intervention.

Make Food Safer with Blockchain Many Asian retailers are leading the way to enhanced food safety with exciting developments in blockchain technologies, a trend which we believe will similarly be employed by U.S. retailers.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Lee Lee Oriental Supermart
catalysts.sentence: On April 8, 2024, AZLL, LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company (AZLL), acquired 100% of the equity interests in Lee Lee Oriental Supermart, Inc. (Lee Lee) for an aggregate purchase price of approximately $22.2 million
On March 12, 2025, we entered into a securities purchase agreement ... to issue a senior unsecured convertible promissory note in the aggregate original principal amount of $3,000,000

catalysts.event: Lease termination for Maison El Monte store
catalysts.sentence: On June 7, 2025, Maison EL Monte, Inc. entered into a lease termination agreement ... The Company closed Maison El Monte store accordingly.

catalysts.event: Extension of Lee Lee note maturity
catalysts.sentence: The Modification Agreement ... extend the maturity date of the Note to May 11, 2026
